title: NWG THE GAME — Every Creature Has a Soul
narrativeConcept: A new player is born on the server. They open their eyes in Castle NumbahWan for the first time. Through their POV, we experience the wonder of discovering this world — the castle, the companions, the cards, the monkeys, the guild, the DLCs, and finally the Wheel of Samsara. The NumbahWan guild members appear as legendary figures in this world. The trailer ends with the new player standing at the guild doors, ready to begin their adventure. The emotional throughline: this world is alive, beautiful, dangerous, and unlike anything you've ever seen.

narrativeArc.act1_birth: 0:00-0:30 — BIRTH: New player opens eyes on the server. The world reveals itself.
narrativeArc.act2_wonder: 0:30-1:30 — WONDER: Discover the game's pillars — companions, combat, cards, social life, monkeys.
narrativeArc.act3_depth: 1:30-2:15 — DEPTH: The 6 DLCs reveal the world goes deeper, higher, underwater, and beyond.
narrativeArc.act4_soul: 2:15-2:45 — SOUL: The Wheel of Samsara. Every creature has a soul. The philosophy that makes NWG unlike any game ever made.

target.tone: Epic emotional with touches of humor. 80% awe/emotion, 20% warmth/charm.

characters.newPlayer: An unnamed new player character — the viewer's avatar. We see through THEIR eyes as they discover the world. Gender-neutral silhouette, glowing with the light of a fresh spawn.
characters.guildMembers: RegginA, RegginO, Natehouoho, Sweetiez, Panthera, Santaboy — appear as legendary figures in the world. Not introduced one by one, but glimpsed in action as part of the world.
characters.cia: CIA the French Bulldog — appears as a companion who finds the new player early and stays with them throughout. The emotional anchor.
characters.monkeys: 200+ monkeys are EVERYWHERE. Background, foreground, causing chaos, being adorable.

scenes.name: ACT 1: BIRTH — Black. Then Light.
scenes.description: Black screen. A heartbeat sound. A single point of light expands. We see through the eyes of a new player opening their eyes for the first time on the server. Blurred, then focusing — the sky above Castle NumbahWan. Cherry blossom petals fall. The Beacon Tower flame burns on Floor 7 in the distance.
shots: Black screen, heartbeat, point of light expanding
POV: Blurred vision focusing — sky, cherry blossoms falling
POV: Camera tilts down — the player sees their own hands, new to this world
Wide: Castle NumbahWan revealed in golden hour, Beacon Tower glowing
scenes.music: Single piano note. Silence. Then a second note.
gameRefs: 02-open-world.webp — Aerial view of the open world

scenes.name: ACT 1: THE LIVING WORLD — A World Worth Getting Lost In
scenes.description: Rapid montage of the living world. The new player walks through the castle gate (golden monkey guardian statues). Sweeping aerials over 8 biomes. The mushroom forest glows. Monkeys steal from market stalls. A deer grazes in a meadow. Fireflies drift through enchanted woods. The moat shimmers with Lumen GI. Day turns to night — aurora borealis in guild colors. The world breathes.
shots: Medium: New player walks through castle gate, dwarfed by golden monkey statues
Aerial sweep: 8 biomes surrounding the castle — forest, mountain, cherry blossom
Detail: Giant bioluminescent mushrooms, spores drifting like underwater snow
Life: Deer grazing, foxes hunting, monkeys stealing from market stall (humor beat)
Night: Aurora borealis painting the sky, Beacon Tower glowing
Wide: The full castle at golden hour — 7 floors visible, mountain inside walls
scenes.music: Strings swell slowly. French horn enters. World theme builds.
gameRefs: 03-castle-gate.webp — Castle gate entrance with monkey statues

scenes.name: ACT 2: COMPANIONS — Every Creature Has a Soul
scenes.description: The new player encounters a wounded wolf in the forest. They approach slowly. Offer food. The wolf snarls, then sniffs the outstretched hand. Trust meter appears briefly. The wolf accepts. They walk together. Quick montage: taming a griffin on a cliff edge, a phoenix nesting on volcanic peaks, crystal deer healing allies, a companion army marching through a mountain pass. Then — CIA the French Bulldog trots up to the new player, tactical vest bouncing, and sits at their feet. Head tilt. The player has found their companion. Emotional peak.
shots: Medium: New player finds wounded wolf in forest, approaches cautiously
Close-up: Hand reaching out with food, wolf sniffing hesitantly
Detail: Trust meter UI appearing — 'TRUST: 12%' → rising
Wide: Wolf and player walking together through golden light
Montage: Griffin taming on cliff edge (courage), phoenix nesting, crystal deer
Epic wide: Full companion army — bears, wolves, griffins — marching through mountain pass
CIA MOMENT: French Bulldog trots into frame, vest bouncing, sits at player's feet
Close-up: CIA's big eyes, head tilt. The player reaches down to pet.
scenes.music: Delicate, emotional strings. Builds with each taming. CIA moment — warm, tender melody.

scenes.name: ACT 2: CARDS & COMBAT — Cards Meet Steel
scenes.description: Inside the castle, the new player discovers combat. Quick action cuts: sword slashes, dodge rolls, parries. Then — a card is drawn mid-combat. A holographic dragon erupts from the card, filling the arena. TCG meets action RPG. Cut to the PvP Arena — two warriors clash. Cut to the sky arena above clouds. Then the magic: a street duel. Two rivals at a glowing table on cobblestones. A Mythic card is played. The holographic projection explodes 4 meters tall. The crowd erupts. Spectators gasp. Natehouoho is glimpsed mid-duel, beanie and butterfly wings, confident smirk.
scenes.emotion: Excitement → spectacle → 'holy shit' at street duel scale
shots: Action: Sword combat sequence — parry, dodge roll, combo chain
Dramatic: Player draws a card mid-fight — holographic dragon erupts from it
Wide: PvP Arena — volcanic stone colosseum, two warriors clashing
Aerial: Sky arena above clouds — tournament of legends
Street: Two rivals at glowing card table on cobblestones, crowd forming
Close-up: Mythic card placed — 'RegginA, The Immortal'
EPIC: 4-meter golden holographic warrior erupts, cobblestones glow, sky changes color
Crowd: Spectators erupting, crowd AI reacting, Commentary Booth floating above
Glimpse: Natehouoho mid-duel — butterfly wings spread, dual swords on the table
scenes.music: Percussion-heavy orchestra. Electronic undertones for street duel. Crowd energy builds.

scenes.name: ACT 2: CASTLE LIFE — More Than Combat
scenes.description: Quick montage of life inside the castle. The tavern — fireplace crackling, bard playing, guild members laughing. Karen's Kitchen — she's yelling at monkey assistants (humor beat). The Grand Library — Oracle crystal pulsing, books floating. The War Room — holographic battle map, RegginA standing at the head of the table. Guild Feast — massive round table, monkey butlers spilling drinks. Fashion Runway — characters strutting, monkey judges scoring. The guild is family. CIA trots through every scene, tail wagging.
scenes.emotion: Warmth, humor, belonging. This is HOME.
shots: Warm: Tavern interior — fireplace, bard, guild members at tables
Humor: Karen yelling at monkey assistant who knocked over a cauldron
Mystery: Grand Library — Oracle crystal ball pulsing with prophecy light
Strategy: War Room — RegginA at holographic battle table, planning
Joy: Guild feast — everyone toasting, monkey butler spilling a drink
Fun: Fashion runway — characters posing, monkey judges holding up score cards
Heart: CIA trotting through a corridor, vest bouncing, connecting the scenes
scenes.music: Warm orchestral. Lighter pizzicato for humor beats. Swells for guild moments.
charRefs: reggina-ue5-refsheet-v2.png — RegginA at war room table

scenes.name: ACT 3: DLC 1 — THE ABYSS BELOW (Boss Dungeons)
scenes.description: The world goes DEEPER. Dungeon entrance — skull-shaped tree root gateway. The team charges in. Rapid boss montage: Monkey King throwing his golden crown, Frost Wyrm circling beneath ice, Clockwork Automaton gears spinning, Ghost Ship graveyard, Shadow Titan made of pure darkness on the mirror floor. Each boss is a flash — terrifying, epic, unique. RegginA leads the charge with golden war hammer blazing.
shots: Entrance: Skull-shaped dungeon gateway, team silhouettes walking in
Boss flash: Monkey King — golden armor, throwing crown boomerang
Boss flash: Frost Wyrm — golden-scaled dragon in crystal ice cavern
Boss flash: Clockwork Automaton — massive gears spinning, steam erupting
Boss flash: Ghost Ship — spectral vessels rising from the Sea of Souls
Boss flash: Shadow Titan — colossal dark entity, mirror floor reflecting twisted reality
Hero: RegginA leading charge, golden war hammer raised, white-cream coat flowing
scenes.music: Drums intensify. Taiko. Brass fanfare. Each boss gets a beat.

scenes.name: ACT 3: DLC 2 & 3 — CARDS ON COBBLESTONES / SKIES OF NUMBAHWAN
scenes.description: DLC 2: The Championship Bridge — 1,000+ spectators, giant holographic projections, the biggest card duel in the castle. Then the camera TILTS UP — through the clouds — revealing DLC 3: Sky Islands. Floating islands with waterfalls cascading into nothing. Griffin stable — majestic creatures with 12-meter wingspans. The NWG Airship sailing through clouds. Cloud village with monkey parliament. Panthera descends from the Celestial sky, angel wings spread. Santaboy arrives in golden light, candy cane staff spinning.
shots: Epic: Championship bridge — massive crowd, holographic projections towering
Transition: Camera tilts UP through clouds — world goes VERTICAL
Reveal: Sky islands floating — waterfalls cascading into clouds
Detail: Griffin stable — majestic creatures, 12-meter wingspans
Wide: NWG Airship sailing through golden clouds, guild emblem in gold leaf
Whimsy: Cloud village — monkey parliament in session (brief humor beat)
Divine: Panthera descending, dual-layer angel wings spread against aurora
Festive: Santaboy arriving in golden light burst, candy cane staff, rose in mouth
scenes.music: Choir enters for sky reveal. Ethereal and soaring. Festive brass for Santaboy.

scenes.name: ACT 3: DLC 4 — THE FORGOTTEN FLOOR (Underground Ruins)
scenes.description: The world goes DEEPER still. Ancient ruins beneath the castle — bioluminescent fungi pulsing like a heartbeat. Mechanical gears still turning after 1,200 years. The Fungal Cavern — giant luminous mushrooms, tiny Sporemite creatures with expressive eyes following the player. The Forbidden Library — bookshelves spiraling infinitely into darkness. Time-Loop Room — hourglasses dripping sand upward, clocks running backwards. RegginO stands in the enchanted canopy of the fungal cavern, rainbow aura illuminating the ancient space. Sweetiez conjures crystal spells in the forbidden library.
shots: Descent: Camera plunges DOWN beneath the castle into darkness
Reveal: Ancient ruins — glowing fungi, mechanical gears embedded in walls
Beauty: Fungal Cavern — 20-meter mushrooms, Sporemite creatures following player
Mystery: Forbidden Library — infinite spiraling bookshelves, reality distortion
Surreal: Time-Loop Room — hourglasses dripping upward, temporal fractures
Magic: RegginO in fungal cavern — rainbow aura illuminating the ancient space
Crystal: Sweetiez casting spells — crystal shards floating in the forbidden library
scenes.music: Deep, resonant bass. Mysterious woodwinds. Ancient percussion.
gameRefs: 62-forgotten-ruins.webp — Ancient ruins with fungi and gears

scenes.name: ACT 3: DLC 5 — SS REGINA (The Shipwreck)
scenes.description: Tone shift. Reverence. The SS Regina — a real 249-foot steel ship built in Scotland, 1907. We see her in her glory first: sailing the Great Lakes, sun on her hull. Then the storm builds. November 9, 1913. The sky darkens. 38-foot waves. The ship rolls. Deck cargo breaks loose. The chadburn set to ALL STOP. Quick cut: underwater — the wreck lying upside-down in 80 feet of water, silent, covered in silt. A diver descends, lantern illuminating the hull. Text appears: '32 crew. No survivors. 1907-1913.' This is NWG's Titanic moment. Respectful. Haunting.
shots: Glory: SS Regina sailing calm waters — 249 feet of steel, sun gleaming
Storm builds: Sky darkening, barometer dropping, waves growing
Horror: 38-foot waves crashing over deck, ship rolling violently
Detail: Chadburn telegraph set to 'ALL STOP' — the crew abandoned ship
Silence: Cut to underwater — wreck upside-down on lakebed, silt drifting
Haunting: Diver descending with lantern, light illuminating the broken hull
Text: '32 crew. No survivors. Rebuilt rivet by rivet in Unreal Engine 5.'
scenes.music: Solo cello. Minimal. The ocean sounds. Wind. Then silence.

scenes.name: ACT 4: THE WHEEL OF SAMSARA — Every Creature Has a Soul
scenes.description: The emotional climax. Back in the game world — we see a player making the wrong choice. They raise a sword against a creature. Red lightning strikes. The sky cracks open. The Wheel of Samsara turns. They're pulled into the Hell Dimension — lava rivers, obsidian valleys, spirit animals wounded by centuries of cruelty. Then redemption: the player kneels, feeds a starving spirit animal. Plants a sacred tree. Good deeds. The tree grows. Golden light breaks through the crimson sky. The player is reborn with a golden aura. Their companion wolf — the one from scene 3 — is waiting for them. Loyalty: 100%. PERMANENTLY BONDED. They walk together into the light. The philosophy appears: 'In this world, we don't kill. We tame. We earn loyalty. Every creature has a soul.'
shots: Sin: A player raises sword against a creature — WRONG CHOICE
Punishment: Red lightning, sky cracking, Wheel of Samsara turning
Hell: Pulled into Hell Dimension — lava, obsidian, wounded spirit animals
Redemption: Player kneels, feeds starving spirit animal, plants sacred tree
Growth: Tree growing over time-lapse, golden light breaking through crimson sky
Rebirth: Player reborn — golden aura visible, standing in light
EMOTIONAL PEAK: The wolf companion from scene 3 is waiting. Loyalty: 100%. PERMANENT BOND.
Walk: Player and wolf walk together into golden light
Text: 'Every creature has a soul.'
scenes.music: Haunting choir for Samsara. Solo piano for redemption. Full orchestra crescendo for rebirth.
gameRefs: samsara/cinematic-ending.webp — Warrior on cliff with companion

scenes.name: ACT 4: THE GUILD ASSEMBLES — NumbahWan United
scenes.description: Final beat. The new player stands at the doors of the NumbahWan Guild Hall. The doors open — golden light pours out. Inside, all 6 guild members stand around the round table. RegginA at the head, golden war hammer. Natehouoho with butterfly wings folded. RegginO's rainbow aura shimmering. Panthera's holy orb pulsing. Sweetiez's crystal wing sparkling. Santaboy with candy cane staff, rose clenched in teeth, glasses glinting. CIA sits by the fire. They all look toward the door — toward the new player. Toward YOU. RegginA nods. The doors close. Title card: NWG THE GAME. Subtitle: 'Every Creature Has a Soul'. Then: '74 Concept Renders | 6 Free DLCs | Unreal Engine 5 | Free to Play'.
shots: Medium: New player standing before guild hall doors — hesitant
Dramatic: Doors swing open — golden light floods out
Wide: All 6 guild members at round table — legendary figures

Close-ups: Each member briefly — RegginA's determined eyes, Natehouoho's smirk, RegginO's gentle smile, Panthera's divine glow, Sweetiez's crystal sparkle, Santaboy's confident grin behind glasses and rose
Heart: CIA by the fireplace, tail wagging, looking at the door
The Nod: RegginA looks at the new player. Nods. Welcome home.
Doors close. Fade to black.
TITLE: NWG THE GAME
SUBTITLE: Every Creature Has a Soul
STATS: 74 Concept Renders | 6 Free DLCs | UE5 | Free to Play
scenes.music: Full orchestra — heroic, warm, FINAL. Piano callback to opening note. Last chord rings.

music.style: Hans Zimmer-style orchestral + emotional piano + choir

structure.description: Solo piano. Two notes. Silence between.
Strings swell, French horn, world theme. Building wonder.
Tender strings, emotional melody. Warm for CIA moment.
Warm orchestral, lighter touches, pizzicato for humor.
Drums, taiko for bosses. Choir for sky reveal. Escalating.
Mystery for ruins. Solo cello for SS Regina. Haunting.
Haunting choir → solo piano → full orchestra crescendo for rebirth.
Final heroic chord. Warm. Piano callback. Last note rings.

keyDifferencesFromV1: NEW: Narrative-driven — new player born on server discovering the world (not generic hero montage)
NEW: All 6 DLCs showcased with actual game screenshots as references
NEW: Companion system is the emotional backbone — wolf taming, CIA throughout
NEW: Samsara is the emotional climax — not a boss fight
NEW: SS Regina treated with historical reverence — NWG's Titanic moment
NEW: Characters glimpsed IN the world naturally, not introduced one-by-one
NEW: CIA is the emotional anchor — appears in companion scene, castle life, and guild finale
NEW: Every scene mapped to specific game screenshots for reference-image generation
REMOVED: Generic environment concept shots without game reference
